CustomField.description: Based on the Effective Unit(Fixed/FH.FC), the Net Units displays the value from FH and FC fields. Incase of Fixed, it displays the value 1.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Based on the Effective Unit(Fixed/FH.FC), the Net Units displays the value from FH and FC fields. Incase of Fixed, it displays the value 1.
CustomField.label: Net Units
